description: Zeroed weights; final_ln.bias channel0=1, head maps channel0 to token '1'. Constant '1' predictor.
Tiny architecture (d_model=8, n_heads=1, n_layers=1, d_ff=8). Constant '1' predictor — minimal params for max interpretability.
2 attn heads accumulate char bags for s1/s2 at the '=' position; MLP computes L1; head predicts '1' when overlap high, else '0'. d_model=128 n_heads=2 n_layers=2 d_ff=132.

Char-bag overlap circuit. 2 attn heads collect s1/s2 char-frequency vectors at the '=' position; block-1 MLP computes K - 38*L1 into channel 101; head decides '1' if positive (L1<0.51) else '0'. d_model=128 n_heads=2 n_layers=2 d_ff=132.

Char-bag overlap circuit (K_CONST=10 -> decision boundary at L1≈0.5). Two attn heads collect s1/s2 char-frequency vectors at '='; MLP computes K-scale*L1; head splits on sign. d_model=128 n_heads=2 n_layers=2 d_ff=132.
Char-bag overlap circuit (K_CONST=14.3 -> L1 decision boundary ≈0.51 accounting for final_ln mean shift). d_model=128 n_heads=2 n_layers=2 d_ff=132.

Char-bag overlap circuit (K_CONST=14). Two attn heads accumulate s1/s2 char-frequency vectors at '='; block-1 MLP computes K - 28*L1 into channel 101; head predicts '1' iff channel > final_ln mean. d_model=128 n_heads=2 n_layers=2 d_ff=132.
Single-block char-bag overlap circuit (n_layers=1). Block's attention collects s1/s2 char bags at '='; same block's MLP computes 14 - 28*L1; head splits on sign. Halves parameter count vs v7.

Single-block char-bag overlap circuit (K=15, n_layers=1). Block's attention collects s1/s2 char bags at '='; same block's MLP computes 15 - 28*L1; head splits on sign. Halves params vs 2-layer v7, same accuracy.
Single-block char-bag overlap circuit with minimal d_model=102 (exactly the channels we need). n_heads=2 (head_dim=51), n_layers=1, d_ff=132. Same circuit; smaller params.

Tiny char-bag overlap (d_model=102, n_heads=2, n_layers=1, d_ff=132, K=14). Block's 2 attn heads collect s1/s2 char bags at '='; same block's MLP computes 14 - L1; head splits on sign. ~6.5x fewer params than v7 with same 0.69 accuracy.

Tiny char-bag-diff overlap circuit. d_model=68, n_heads=2, n_layers=1, d_ff=132. W_o subtracts head2 from head1 so we store only s1-s2 char-frequency DIFFERENCE; MLP turns its L1 norm into overlap score. Even fewer params than v11.
Tiny char-bag-diff overlap (d_model=68, n_heads=2, n_layers=1, d_ff=132, K=20). W_o subtracts head2 from head1 storing only s1-s2 char-frequency DIFFERENCE; MLP computes L1; head splits on sign.
Tiny char-bag-diff overlap with '_'-weighted L1 (d_model=68, n_heads=2, n_layers=1, d_ff=132, K=20, us_w=2). Length-difference channel gets 2x weight since paraphrases tend to have similar length.
Two-feature char-bag circuit (d_model=68, n_heads=2, n_layers=1, d_ff=132). Feature1: K1-weighted_L1 (us_w=2). Feature2: relu(K2 - 3*|len_diff|). Head reads both.

Tiny 2-feature char-bag circuit (d_model=68, d_ff=68, n_heads=2, n_layers=1). Same 2-feature design as v15 with d_ff halved from 132 to 68 (2 MLP rows per char instead of 4). Fewer params, same accuracy.
Minimal 2-feature char-bag circuit (d_model=68, d_ff=66, n_heads=2, n_layers=1). Same 2-feature design as v15/v16 but d_ff trimmed to bare minimum (exactly 2 rows per char). Same 0.73 accuracy.
Ablation: v17 with feature-2 disabled (only weighted-L1 feature). Sanity check.
Ablation: v17 with us_w=1.0 (uniform char weighting, no extra "_" emphasis).
Ablation: v17 with us_w=3.0 (stronger length-difference weighting).
2-layer minimal compact variant: d_model=36, n_heads=1, n_layers=2, d_ff=68. Channel-reuse trick puts diff-bag into the same chans as token emb. ~33% fewer params than v17, but 0.7050 acc.
